  • Method Details

    • addDescriptionsTo

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory... values)
      Add descriptions.

      Identifies which categories of types that descriptions should be automatically added to generated schemas. The description is the result of calling ClassInfo.getName(). The format is a comma-delimited list of any of the following values:

      • BEAN
      • COLLECTION
      • ARRAY
      • MAP
      • STRING
      • NUMBER
      • BOOLEAN
      • ANY
      • OTHER
      Parameters:
      values - The values to add to this setting.
      The default is an empty string.
      Cannot contain null values.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • addExamplesTo

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder addExamplesTo(TypeCategory... values)
      Add examples.

      Identifies which categories of types that examples should be automatically added to generated schemas.

      The examples come from calling ClassMeta.getExample(MarshallingSession,JsonParserSession) which in turn gets examples from the following:

      • Example
      • Marshalled(example)

      The format is a comma-delimited list of any of the following values:

      • BEAN
      • COLLECTION
      • ARRAY
      • MAP
      • STRING
      • NUMBER
      • BOOLEAN
      • ANY
      • OTHER
      Parameters:
      values - The values to add to this setting.
      The default is an empty string.
      Cannot contain null values.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • allowNestedDescriptions

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder allowNestedDescriptions()
      Allow nested descriptions.

      Identifies whether nested descriptions are allowed in schema definitions.

      Returns:
      This object.

    • allowNestedDescriptions

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder allowNestedDescriptions(boolean value)
      Same as allowNestedDescriptions() but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
      Parameters:
      value - The value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder allowNestedExamples()
      Allow nested examples.

      Identifies whether nested examples are allowed in schema definitions.

      Returns:
      This object.

    • allowNestedExamples

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder allowNestedExamples(boolean value)
      Same as allowNestedExamples() but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
      Parameters:
      value - The value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • beanDefMapper

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder beanDefMapper(Class<? extends MarshallingDefMapper> value)
      Schema definition mapper.

      Interface to use for converting Bean classes to definition IDs and URIs.

      Used primarily for defining common definition sections for beans in Swagger JSON.

      This setting is ignored if useBeanDefs() is not enabled.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      The default is BasicBeanDefMapper.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • getJsonParserBuilder

      public JsonParser.Builder<?> getJsonParserBuilder()
      Gives access to the inner JSON parser builder if you want to modify the parser settings.
      Returns:
      The JSON serializer builder.

    • getJsonSerializerBuilder

      public JsonSerializer.Builder<?> getJsonSerializerBuilder()
      Gives access to the inner JSON serializer builder if you want to modify the serializer settings.
      Returns:
      The JSON serializer builder.

    • hashKey

      public HashKey hashKey()
      Description copied from class: Context.Builder
      Returns the hashkey of this builder.

      Used to return previously instantiated context beans that have matching hashkeys. The HashKey object is suitable for use as a hashmap key of a map of context beans. A context bean is considered equivalent if the HashKey.equals(Object) method is the same.

      Overrides:
      hashKey in class MarshallingTraverseContext.Builder<JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder>
      Returns:
      The hashkey of this builder.

    • ignoreTypes

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder ignoreTypes(String... values)
      Ignore types from schema definitions.
      Description:

      Defines class name patterns that should be ignored when generating schema definitions in the generated Swagger documentation.

      Example:

      // Don't generate schema for any prototype packages or the class named 'Swagger'. @JsonSchemaConfig( ignoreTypes="Swagger,*.proto.*" ) public class MyResource {...}

      Parameters:
      values - The values to add.
      Cannot contain null values.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • useBeanDefs

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder useBeanDefs()
      Use bean definitions.

      When enabled, schemas on beans will be serialized as the following:

      { type: 'object', '$ref': '#/definitions/TypeId' }

      The definitions can then be retrieved from the session using JsonSchemaGeneratorSession.getBeanDefs().

      Definitions can also be added programmatically using JsonSchemaGeneratorSession.addBeanDef(String, JsonMap).

      Returns:
      This object.

    • useBeanDefs

      public JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder useBeanDefs(boolean value)
      Same as useBeanDefs() but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
      Parameters:
      value - The value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.
